Bash(node -e "const { execSync } = require\('child_process'\); let ctx='Git state at session start:'; try { const un = execSync\('git log --oneline @{u}..HEAD', {encoding:'utf8'}\).trim\(\); if\(un\) ctx += '\\n\\nUnpushed commits:\\n' + un; } catch\(e\){} try { const st = execSync\('git status --porcelain', {encoding:'utf8'}\).trim\(\); ctx += st ? '\\n\\nUncommitted changes:\\n' + st : '\\n\\n\(working tree clean\)'; } catch\(e\){} process.stdout.write\(JSON.stringify\({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:'SessionStart',additionalContext:ctx}}\)\);")
